title: carex divisa f. rivularis
intro: Carex divisa f. rivularis, a variant of the sedge plant Carex divisa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex divisa f. rivularis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as to soothe digestive problems.
